about.heading: Creative Developer & Designer
about.p1: I'm a fresh design graduate with a passion for blending creativity with functionality. My journey started with a fascination for how things look and work together, leading me to pursue a career in digital design and development.
about.p2: With skills in both design and front-end development, I bridge the gap between beautiful aesthetics and seamless user experiences. I believe every pixel matters and every interaction should be intentional.
about.p3: When I'm not designing or coding, you'll find me exploring new design trends, contributing to open-source projects, or sharing knowledge with the design community.

education.desc: Specialized in Digital Design and User Experience. Completed capstone project on designing inclusive mobile applications.
Comprehensive program covering design thinking, wireframing, prototyping, and user research methodologies.
Intensive 12-week program focusing on HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and React. Built 8+ full-stack projects.

projects.title: Analytics Dashboard
projects.desc: Designed a comprehensive analytics dashboard for a SaaS platform, improving data visualization and user engagement.

projects.title: E-Commerce Platform
projects.desc: Built a responsive e-commerce site with product filtering, cart management, and checkout flow optimization.

projects.title: Fitness Tracker App
projects.desc: Designed a mobile fitness tracking application with workout logging, progress visualization, and social features.

projects.title: Property Listing Site
projects.desc: Created a property listing platform with advanced search filters, virtual tours, and agent management dashboard.

projects.title: Online Learning Platform
projects.desc: Built an interactive educational platform with course management, student progress tracking, and video integration.

projects.title: Community Chat App
projects.desc: Designed and developed a real-time chat application with threading, notifications, and user presence indicators.

contact.heading: Ready to create something amazing?
contact.desc: Let's collaborate on your next project. Whether you need a stunning website, an app experience, or a complete brand overhaul, I'm here to help bring your vision to life.
